_comment: Safe demo catalog. `demo` uses inline generic steps and writes ONLY under DEMO_DIR (resolved from the env via the prompt processor). Exercises: prompt(EnvResolver, non-blocking) + register/templating + shell(platform) + ensure_line(idempotent) + copy + sentinel_meta. `hello` shows the terse desugar path. No network, no builds.

tools.description: writes a few files under DEMO_DIR (safe, idempotent)
